summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 3 new features: Site Settings customization, Order History, and dynamic site settings application. All backend APIs working (100% success rate), admin Settings tab functional, and dynamic settings correctly applied across all components.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/site-settings (public endpoint)
Backend API: PUT /api/site-settings (admin only)
Backend API: GET /api/user/orders (authenticated users)
Admin login with correct credentials (mateusbpugli@gmail.com)
Admin dashboard loads with new Settings tab
Settings tab shows all customization fields (site name, colors, hero text, marquee)
Admin can save site settings and they persist
Dynamic site settings applied to header (site name)
Dynamic site settings applied to hero section (hero title/subtitle)
Dynamic site settings applied to marquee (marquee text)
Dynamic site settings applied to footer (support email)
Order history route /meus-pedidos redirects to login when not authenticated
Order history link appears in header when user is logged in
All previous features still working (campaigns, products, gallery, bio, newsletter)
Email notifications in LOG mode working correctly
Site settings persistence after page reload
Color picker functionality in admin settings
All 21 backend API tests passing
Stripe checkout integration still working
Admin stats dashboard functional
